qa_pairs.question: What is the initial step required on a VM before mounting a CephFS device?
qa_pairs.answer: Before mounting a CephFS device on your VM, you must first create a mount point directory. An example is creating a directory named `/cephfs` using the command `mkdir /cephfs`.

qa_pairs.question: How can a CephFS device be permanently mounted on an Arbutus VM using the `fstab` file?
qa_pairs.answer: To permanently mount a CephFS device on an Arbutus VM, you can add a line similar to this to the `/etc/fstab` file: `:/volumes/_nogroup/f6cb8f06-f0a4-4b88-b261-f8bd6b03582c /cephfs/ ceph name=MyCephFS-RW,nofail 0 2`.
